select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE BRD_ID = 1 AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = IFNULL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = IFNULL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step

sqlMap.select: SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.REFLAG = '0'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.STARTDATE ASC, A.ENDDATE DESC LIMIT #v_PPAGE#

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE
AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID#
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID#
AND REFLAG = '0' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.NUM , A.PNUM , A.OWNERID , A.TENANT_ID, A.COMPANYID, A.title title , A.LOCATION , A.TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , A.ALERTTIME , A.REFLAG , A.GRESFLAG , A.WRITERID , A.IMPORTANCE , A.ENTRYLIST , A.ALLDAY , A.CONTENT , DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , A.ATTACHFLAG , A.CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG , C.APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2, IF(isnull(F.RESID),'N','Y') FAVORITE, C.BRD_NM BRDNM, C.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2, D.STARTDATETIME REPSTARTDATE, D.ENDDATETIME REPENDDATE, CASE A.REFLAG WHEN '0' THEN '비반복' WHEN '1' THEN '반복' ELSE '불확실' END REPTYPE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A
LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_BRD C ON A.OWNERID = C.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.BRD_COMPANY LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION D ON A.OWNERID = D.OWNERID AND A.NUM = D.NUM AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_FAVORITE F ON A.OWNERID = F.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITERID = F.USERID WHERE A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.NUM = #v_PNUM# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND A.REFLAG NOT IN('4') AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.BRD_ID, A.BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_PBRDCOMPANY# AND A.BRD_GB = '1' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION
SELECT A.BRD_ID, A.BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_PBRDCOMPANY# AND A.BRD_GB = '2' AND A.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE , REFLAG, GRESFLAG, WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_POWNERID#, #v_PNUM#, #v_PPNUM#, #v_PCOMPANYID#, #v_PWRITERID#, #v_PDEPTNM#, #v_POWNERNM#, #v_PTITLE# , #v_PLOCATION#, #v_PTIMEDISPLAY#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_PALLDAY#, #v_PALERTTIME#, #v_PCONTENT#, #v_PIMPORTANCE#, IFNULL(#v_PREFLAG#,'0'), IFNULL(#v_PGRESFLAG#,' '), STR_TO_DATE(#v_PWRITEDAY#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_PENTRYLIST#, IFNULL(#v_PCHARACTERID#,0), #v_PATTACHFLAG#, IFNULL(#v_PAPPROVEFLAG#,'0'), #v_PSCHEDULEID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_PTITLE#,
STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'),
CONTENT = #v_PCONTENT#,
ALERTTIME = #v_PALERTTIME#, ALLDAY = IFNULL(#v_PALLDAY#,'0'), IMPORTANCE = #v_PIMPORTANCE# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND REFLAG = #v_PREFLAG# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET REFLAG = '4' WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, deptNM, ownerNM, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, companyID, characterID, attachFlag, tenant_ID ) SELECT #v_PMAXNUM# num , #v_PNUM# pnum , OWNERID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') startDate , STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') endDate , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , '4' reFlag , GRESFLAG , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , STR_TO_DATE(#v_PNOWDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') writeDay , #v_PCOMPANYID# companyID , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , tenant_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND REFLAG = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.RESID, A.USERID, A.RESCOMPANY, A.TENANT_ID, B.BRD_NM BRDNM, B.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2 FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE A JOIN TBL_RS_BRD B ON A.RESID = B.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.RESCOMPANY = B.BRD_COMPANY JOIN TBL_RS_BRD C ON C.BRD_ID = B.BRD_UPPER AND C.BRD_COMPANY = B.BRD_COMPANY AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.RESCOMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND B.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' ORDER BY C.BRD_UPPER, C.BRD_STEP, B.BRD_STEP
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_FAVORITE ( RESID, RESCOMPANY, USERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PRESID#, #v_PCOMPANYID#, #v_PUSERID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND RESID = #v_PRESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.NUM , A.PNUM , A.OWNERID , A.title title , A.LOCATION , A.TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') DATE , A.ownerID VALUE , A.ALERTTIME , A.REFLAG , A.GRESFLAG , A.WRITERID , A.IMPORTANCE , A.ENTRYLIST , A.ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , A.ATTACHFLAG , A.CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG , C.APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2, C.BRD_NM BRDNM, C.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2, C.BRD_STEP BRDSTEP, C.BRD_UPPER BRDUPPER, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(E.RESID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE E WHERE E.USERID = A.WRITERID AND E.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND E.RESID = A.OWNERID AND E.RESCOMPANY = A.COMPANYID) FAVORITEYN FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN ((SELECT D.cn, D.displayname, D.displayname2, D.description, D.description2, D.department, D.title, D.title2, D.tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND D.physicaldeliveryofficename = #v_PCOMPANYID#) UNION ALL (SELECT F.cn, F.displayname ownernm, F.displayname2 ownernm2, G.displayname deptnm, G.displayname2 deptnm2, G.cn department, E.title jobtitle, E.title2 jobtitle2, F.tenant_id FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER E JOIN TBL_USERMASTER F ON E.tenant_id = F.tenant_id AND E.cn = F.cn RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER G ON E.tenant_id = G.tenant_id AND E.deptid = G.cn WHERE E.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND G.extensionattribute2 = #v_PCOMPANYID#)) B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD C ON A.OWNERID = C.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= A.ENDDATE AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID#
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID#
AND REFLAG = '0'
AND B.DEPARTMENT = #v_WRITERDEPT#
AND C.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.NUM ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.num , A.PNUM , A.ownerID , A.title title , A.LOCATION , A.TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') DATE , A.ownerID VALUE , A.ALERTTIME , A.REFLAG , A.GRESFLAG , A.WRITERID , A.IMPORTANCE , A.ENTRYLIST , A.ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , A.ATTACHFLAG , A.companyID , A.CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG , D.APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 , D.BRD_NM BRDNM, D.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2, D.BRD_STEP BRDSTEP, D.BRD_UPPER BRDUPPER, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(E.RESID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE E WHERE E.USERID = A.WRITERID AND E.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND E.RESID = A.OWNERID AND E.RESCOMPANY = A.COMPANYID) FAVORITEYN FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.writerID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD D ON A.OWNERID = D.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID#
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID#
AND REFLAG = '1' AND ( STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME )
AND B.DEPARTMENT = #v_WRITERDEPT#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.OWNERID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.APPROVEFLAG , SCH.OWNERNM , DEPTNM , SCH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND REFLAG = '0'
AND BRD.BRD_UPPER = #v_pOwnerID#
AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.ownerID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.ApproveFlag , SCH.ownerNM , DEPTNM , SCH.companyID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID#
AND BRD.Brd_Upper = #v_POWNERID#
AND REFLAG = '1' AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE PNUM = #v_P_pNum# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID#
AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID#
AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID#
AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID#
AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, DATE_FORMAT(holidaydate, '%Y/%m/%d') calendarday , ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany, holidayflag, holidayrepeat from tbl_holidaylist where tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and ( isuse = '1' and isrest = '1' )

isNotEqual.isEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, DATE_FORMAT(holidaydate, '%Y/%m/%d') calendarday , ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany, holidayflag, holidayrepeat from tbl_holidaylist where (usecompany = '1' or usecompany = #v_USERCOMPANY#) and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and ( isuse = '1' and isrest = '1' )
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: select holidayid, holidayname, holidayname2, holidaydate, DATE_FORMAT(holidaydate, '%Y/%m/%d') calendarday , ifnull(issolar, '0') issolar, ifnull(isrepeat, '0') isrepeat, ifnull(isuse, '0') isuse, ifnull(isrest, '0') isrest, usecompany, holidayflag, holidayrepeat from tbl_holidaylist where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# and ( isuse = '1' and isrest = '1' )

sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM , COMPANYID, STARTDATETIME, ENDDATETIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND OWNERID = #v_OWNERID#
SELECT BRD_ID OWNERID, APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, BRD_NM BRDNM, OWNERID MANAGERIDS FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.NUM , A.PNUM , A.OWNERID , A.title title , A.LOCATION , A.TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') DATE , A.ownerID VALUE , A.ALERTTIME , A.REFLAG , A.GRESFLAG , A.WRITERID , A.IMPORTANCE , A.ENTRYLIST , A.ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , A.ATTACHFLAG , A.CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG , C.APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2, C.BRD_NM BRDNM, C.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2, C.BRD_STEP BRDSTEP, D.BRD_UPPER BRDUPPER, D.BRD_STEP BRDUPPERSTEP, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(E.RESID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE E WHERE E.USERID = A.WRITERID AND E.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND E.RESID = A.OWNERID AND E.RESCOMPANY = A.COMPANYID) FAVORITEYN FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD C ON A.OWNERID = C.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD D ON D.BRD_ID = C.BRD_UPPER AND D.BRD_COMPANY = C.BRD_COMPANY AND D.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= A.ENDDATE AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND C.APPROVEFLAG = '1' AND C.BRD_GB = '2'
AND ( C.BRD_UPPER IN (SELECT R.RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL R WHERE (R.MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMPANYID# OR R.MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR R.MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR R.MEMBER_ID = 'everyone') AND C.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND R.ACCESS_LVL = '1' ) OR C.OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# OR C.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',' , #v_PUSERID#) OR C.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUSERID#, ',' , '%') OR C.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',', #v_PUSERID#, ',', '%') )
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID#
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = #v_APPROVETYPE#
AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') )
AND REFLAG = '0' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.num , A.PNUM , A.ownerID , A.title title , A.LOCATION , A.TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') DATE , A.ownerID VALUE , A.ALERTTIME , A.REFLAG , A.GRESFLAG , A.WRITERID , A.IMPORTANCE , A.ENTRYLIST , A.ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , A.ATTACHFLAG , A.companyID , A.CHARACTERID , A.APPROVEFLAG , D.APPROVEFLAG RESAPPROVEFLAG, B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 , D.BRD_NM BRDNM, D.BRD_NM2 BRDNM2, D.BRD_STEP BRDSTEP, E.BRD_UPPER BRDUPPER, E.BRD_STEP BRDUPPERSTEP, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(E.RESID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE E WHERE E.USERID = A.WRITERID AND E.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND E.RESID = A.OWNERID AND E.RESCOMPANY = A.COMPANYID) FAVORITEYN FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.writerID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD D ON A.OWNERID = D.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_BRD E ON E.BRD_ID = D.BRD_UPPER AND E.BRD_COMPANY = D.BRD_COMPANY AND E.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND D.APPROVEFLAG = '1' AND D.BRD_GB = '2'
AND ( D.BRD_UPPER IN (SELECT R.RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL R WHERE (R.MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMPANYID# OR R.MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR R.MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR R.MEMBER_ID = 'everyone') AND D.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND R.ACCESS_LVL = '1' ) OR D.OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# OR D.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',' , #v_PUSERID#) OR D.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUSERID#, ',' , '%') OR D.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',', #v_PUSERID#, ',', '%') )
AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID#
AND A.APPROVEFLAG = #v_APPROVETYPE#
AND REFLAG = '1' AND ( STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME )
AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') )
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.BRD_ID, A.BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_RS_BRD A JOIN TBL_RS_BRD B ON B.BRD_ID = A.BRD_UPPER AND B.BRD_COMPANY = A.BRD_COMPANY AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_PUSERCOMPANY# AND A.BRD_GB = '2' AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '1'
AND ( A.BRD_UPPER IN (SELECT B.RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL B WHERE (B.MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERCOMPANY# OR B.MEMBER_ID= #v_PUSERDEPT# OR B.MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR B.MEMBER_ID = 'everyone') AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND B.ACCESS_LVL = '1' ) OR A.OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# OR A.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',' , #v_PUSERID#) OR A.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT(#v_PUSERID#, ',' , '%') OR A.OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',', #v_PUSERID#, ',', '%'))
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.BRD_UPPER, B.BRD_STEP, A.BRD_STEP

SELECT RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERDEPT# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND ACCESS_LVL = 1
AND RESID = #v_brdID#
AND COMPANYID = #v_PBRDCOMPANY#

SELECT RESID FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERDEPT# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND ACCESS_LVL = 1
AND RESID = #v_brdID#
AND SDA_YN = 'Y' AND COMPANYID = #v_PBRDCOMPANY#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET APPROVEFLAG = #v_PAPPROVE# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE ( OWNERID = #userId# OR OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',', #userId#) OR OWNERID LIKE CONCAT(#userId#, ',', '%') OR OWNERID LIKE CONCAT('%', ',', #userId#, ',', '%') ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND BRD_COMPANY = #companyId#
SELECT if(BRD_GB = '1', #ownerId#, BRD_UPPER) BRD_UPPER FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #ownerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND BRD_COMPANY = #companyId#
